user.title: Connect to iHost
user.description: Enter the IP Address of your iHost.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Discovered iHost
zeroconf_confirm.description: Do you want to configure the iHost discovered at {ip_address}?

link.title: Link iHost
link.description: Please open the [iHost web interface](http://{ip_address}) in a new tab. **Once the page is open**, click Submit here, then immediately switch back to the iHost tab to approve the connection prompt.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the iHost.
error.button_not_pressed: The connection was not approved. Please connect to the iHost web interface to approve the connection and try again.
